This refers to the double verification of the cardholder for online payments. When 3D Secure is enabled for the card, the Cardholder is asked to confirm payment by entering not only the details of the card but also the 3D Secure password. If the service is enabled, though the password is not set, or if it was entered incorrectly, or not provided at all on request, payment is not processed and the funds remain on the card.
